definition:
1. to drive mad  with passion, (Euripides); ἐκμῆναί τινα δωμάτων to drive one raving  from the house, (Euripides):—;Pass., with perfect 2 active ἐκμέμηνα, to go mad  with passion, be furious , (Herdotus Historicus) 
2. with accusative rei, ἐκμῆναι πόθον to kindle mad  desire, (Sophocles Tragicus) (ML)
